contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Please do not leave voicemails, prefer **calls or SMS**

access.title: Access
access.description: Via **Hautefeuille** and **route de la Noue**. Note that some GPS may suggest incorrect routes.

rendezVous.title: Appointment
rendezVous.description: Please let us know before visiting the atelier to ensure our availability.

bonus.title: Thank you for your visit!
bonus.description:
It’s a pleasure to welcome you to the atelier. Your equipment is in good hands, Baloo, our four-legged companion, is keeping an eye on it in his own way.

Wishing you many wonderful flights!
